meta.branch_strategy: feature work on refactor/* or feature/* branches, merge to develop, release from main
meta.maintenance_note: This file is the canonical roadmap. Update statuses and subtasks whenever scope or implementation changes.

subtasks.title: Use pyproject.toml for project/build metadata
Remove runtime third-party date dependencies
Package locale JSON data and py.typed
Document supported Python versions
Gregorian <-> JDN conversion
Persian (Jalali) <-> JDN conversion
Islamic (tabular) <-> JDN conversion
Strict validation and error contract in conversion APIs
Datetime/fractional-day support
Public from_jdn/to_jdn helper APIs
KurdishDate immutable model
KurdishDate conversion helpers (gregorian/persian/islamic)
Range/type validation in KurdishDate constructors
Add Nineveh/612 BCE era support under KurdishEra
Add tests to prevent cross-era mixing/regressions
Add KurdishDateTime or equivalent datetime-aware wrapper
Locale identifiers (en/ku/fa/tr/ar)
Move locale catalog to JSON data file
Safe fixed-token formatting API
Digit localization utility
Rojjmer powered by new core conversion logic
Class-level deprecation policy for Rojjmer
Publish removal version and migration timeline
Document migration examples for legacy users
PEP 8 naming audit across all modules
Ensure explicit return types on all public APIs
Add stronger structured typing for JSON loader (TypedDict / parser validation)
Eliminate Any-like patterns in locale/catalog loader
Add type-oriented tests for bool/non-int/None edge-cases
Architecture overview document
Calculation methodology document with formulas and examples
Public API exception contract documentation
Document tabular Islamic caveat vs observational calendars
Add changelog and release notes format
CI for pytest/ruff/mypy
Coverage reporting and fail threshold
Security linting (Bandit or equivalent) in CI
Locale catalog schema validation in tests
Define compatibility matrix against historical pyroj behavior
Define semver policy for calculation behavior changes
Define tested precision envelope and supported year bounds rationale
Define locale data governance process (review/sources/approval)
